programme.title: Capítulo 111
programme.desc: Teo tells Miguel he passed the test given by the Lodge members and it's all thanks to his girlfriend, Roberta. Franco tells Mia about her mom.

programme.title: Capítulo 112
programme.desc: Franco tells Miguel that Mia has been happier and more mature since she fell in love. Carlo, Mia's uncle comes to visit; him along with Franco, Valeria, Alma, Mia, and Miguel spend the weekend together.

programme.title: Capítulo 113
programme.desc: Paola tells Roberta everything that happened between León and her. Miguel apologizes to Mia for exploding on her about his father.

programme.title: Capítulo 114
programme.desc: Giovanni, Mia, Roberta, Diego, Miguel, and Mia have a successful show. Giovanni's mother embarrasses him in front of Tomas and his mother when they're invited to dinner.

programme.title: Capítulo 115
programme.desc: Miguel becomes upset when he learns that Mia invited his mother and sister to Cuernavaca. Giovanni's mother, Luisa, cries when she learns that he is ashamed of his family and lied about her not being his mother.

programme.title: Capítulo 116
programme.desc: While telling Diego about Luisa, Tomás makes fun of her, and Giovanni beats him up. Lupita asks Nico why Miguel is so worried about Mia.

programme.title: Capítulo 117
programme.desc: The leader of the Lodge, Rodrigo, tells Teo he has failed them. Nico reveals to Lupita that Miguel is afraid to love Mia because he feels like he's betraying his father. Rodrigo tells Miguel that Julieta is sick and to stop asking for her.

programme.title: Capítulo 118
programme.desc: Lupita tells Mia that Miguel may not be ready for a girlfriend even though she's in love with him. Giovanni is truly sorry and wants to see his parents.

programme.title: Capítulo 119
programme.desc: Lupita follows Miguel and he sees him with Julieta then tells Mia that Miguel became her boyfriend out of revenge (she's assumes the worst and basically ruins everything). Before Miguel can tell Mia the entire truth she tells everyone she went out with him on a bet.

programme.title: Capítulo 120
programme.desc: Roberta is afraid her mother's reputation will cast a shadow on her career in the band. Marcelino's brother escapes and has him ask for money from Alma and Pepa and steal from other places. Esteban overworks José until she collapses.

programme.desc: A woman driving solo to visit a friend on Florida's I-95 mysteriously vanishes. Her divorce leads police one way, but when her body is found it suggests something horribly different. Another woman who reads about the case has a hunch she knows the killer.

programme.title: The Jersey Devil
programme.desc: 16 year-old Brittney Gregory is a star student in Brick Township, New Jersey. When she vanishes one night in 2004, local police begin a search that leads them into a world of dark secrets and dangerous players as they work to solve her disappearance.

programme.title: Driven To Murder
programme.desc: In October of 2016, after helping a friend fix his computer, 18-year-old tech prodigy, Sam Poss, takes off on foot and never returns home. Did the beloved teen run away? Was there an accident? Police work around the clock to find the truth.

programme.title: The Sheriff's Son
programme.desc: When an Arkansas outdoorsman disappears, authorities wade through a series of accusations and rumors in their hunt for the missing man. As they zero in on a suspect and the body count rises, detectives rush to capture the killer.

programme.title: Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Twenty eight-year-old army veteran and beloved father of three, Joey Fulgham, is shot dead in his bed in May 2003. With so many suspects Joey's wife, her jealous boyfriend, and even her protective teenage brother police have a lot of ground to cover.

programme.title: El nuevo vecino

programme.title: El grupo de whats
programme.desc: Germán convoca a una junta vecinal, pero nadie asiste porque nadie vio el anuncio en el pizarrón, Jorjais les propone hacer un grupo de chat para enterarse de los acontecimientos en el edificio.

programme.title: El gas
programme.desc: Como es costumbre en el edificio, los vecinos no pagan la cuota del gas, y ante la negativa de todos, Luis decide poner su propio tanque estacionario ¡en la azotea!

programme.title: Franeleros
programme.desc: Luis estaciona su carro afuera de su edificio y un franelero quiere cobrarle 20 pesos por cuidar su coche. Los vecinos hacen una junta para planear quitarlos sin que haya consecuencias.

programme.title: El genio bursátil
programme.desc: Ludovico se mete en problemas en su trabajo cuando, por impertinente, trata de ayudar a Don Camerino en unos temas financieros. Tratando de solucionar el enredo, Ludovico complica todo aún más. Finalmente, y a punto de que ocurra un desastre financiero, Ludovico acude a la única persona que lo puede ayudar: Júnior.

programme.title: La sirvienta
programme.desc: Ludovico and Federica search for a maid; after much disagreement they find one.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Follows a dysfunctional family in Peluche City.

programme.title: Las cenizas
programme.desc: Ludovico will inherit his rich uncle's property if he can protect his ashes for two days.

programme.title: Una luz al fondo del tinaco
programme.desc: María intenta lavar el tanque de agua y queda atrapada en él. En el almacén, Carmelo juega con Delfino y Betza. Doña Lucha no sabe que María está dentro del tinaco y prende la bomba.

programme.title: Segundo aire
programme.desc: Germán descubre que en el edificio hay una plaga de cucarachas, por lo que Magdalena le ordena que haga una inspección en su departamento.

programme.title: Número equivocado
programme.desc: Alguien grafiteó la fachada del edificio. Para retirarlo, Germán cambia el número de la entrada. ¿Recibirá Luis el paquete que espera? ¿Acudirán a pintar el departamento de Lorena?

programme.title: Magdalena y la tercera edad
programme.desc: Magdalena descubre que las personas de tercera edad recibirán tarjetas de ayuda. La familia López Pérez intenta obtener el beneficio. A Luis le molesta que Benito tenga un auto nuevo.

programme.title: Cásate conmigo
programme.desc: Comienza una guerra tras la pelea entre Silvia y Luis, sin embargo él le pide matrimonio. Lorena le pide a Germán que arregle una mesa.

programme.title: La boda
programme.desc: Luis y Silvia anuncian su boda y los vecinos los convencerán para que se casen en el edificio y ayudarán a los preparativos.

programme.title: Vecinos ruidosos
programme.desc: Los vecinos se quejan de los ruidos que vienen del departamento de Luis y Silvita, Germán intenta reparar la tubería de Lorena y los López Pérez sufren de comezón.

programme.title: Frankie regresa
programme.desc: Frankie regresa a vivir al edificio, con Lorena y con Benito, pero con la condición de que encuentre trabajo. Pero, en vez de eso, escribirá una nueva película.

programme.title: La llegada de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa vuelve al edificio para visitar a los Vecinos y ponerse al corriente. Benito invita a su novia a "ver pelis" en el departamento, al enterarse de que sus papás saldrán.

programme.title: La cocina de Silvita
programme.desc: Como Luis le ha preparado el desayuno, Silvita se encargará de prepararle a su esposo un platillo espectacular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: La cosas de Don Roque
programme.desc: Germán le entrega a Vanessa cosas que le dejó don Roque, por lo que ambos lo recuerdan y homenajean. Lorena aprecia a Soledad, la nueva amiga de Benito.

programme.title: El tamalero
programme.desc: Como el tamalero no deja dormir a Luis, este le pedirá que le baje a su bocina. Ve cuántos enemigos se echará encima, por dejar sin trabajo al tamalero.

programme.title: Los paramédicos
programme.desc: Por pedirle a Morris que ponga en su tarea que son paramédicos, Rocko y Ale deben ir a la escuela a dar un curso de primeros auxilios. Llegan nuevos vecinos al departamento 301.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Los ex
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Silvita que deje de hablar con su ex, pues se siente incómodo, sin sospechar que Maru, ex de Luis, llegará a la puerta de su casa. Además, la obra de arte de Jorjais.

programme.title: El cumpleaños de Germán
programme.desc: Todos se olvidan del cumpleaños de Germán, a pesar de estar invitados a la fiesta. Lorena y Frankie le dicen a Benito que volverá a los castings.

programme.title: La amiga incómoda
programme.desc: La amiga de Silvita se queda en el departamento de los recién casados, ya que se ha quedado sin casa. Además, Magda trata de convencer a los vecinos para que acepten poner un anuncio en la fachada del edificio.

programme.title: El nuevo reglamento
programme.desc: Los Rivers solo tienen dinero para comer atún. Así que Frankie envía a Benito a hacer el casting para interpretar al Sol. Pero Luis propone realizar un nuevo reglamento de convivencia vecinal.

programme.title: La historia de Jorjáis
programme.desc: Jorjáis cuenta su verdadera historia, y hará llorar a más de uno. Mientras tanto, como Frankie y Lorena no están en casa, Benito y Liz aprovecharán para hacer algo en su ausencia.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: A man riding a bicycle at night is stopped for having no lights on it, but the deputy gets suspicious when the man begins to freak out; an officer sees two people pull up to a store in a car with no registration tags, then hurriedly walk away from it when they see him; a driver accuses another driver of threatening her with a gun.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: The owner of a truck discovers what happens when the door doesn't get locked; police level with a troubled man and implore him to make better choices; an officer acts as a therapist for multiple people and their relationships.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies work together to stay on the tail of a fleeing vehicle; an argumentative driver keeps his friends tuned in as he livestreams his own arrest; a mother's desire to scare her daughter into behaving takes a serious turn.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items; a young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed "Sketchy"; some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: Heart of Glass
programme.desc: A man weaves a stolen motorbike through traffic at high speeds as he tries to evade police; deputies examine the aftermath of a violent domestic argument; a mom and dad deny that their habits could affect their child.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them; both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence; a 12-year friendship is jeopardized when a woman suspects her roommate of stealing.

programme.desc: A woman asks police to get involved after her ex threatened to destroy her home; prior medical procedures drive a woman to find a dangerous way to ease her pain; deputies search for a mysterious driver who fled a car crash.

programme.desc: Cameras catch police in action as they confront crime and comfort victims.

programme.desc: The captains battle weather, equipment and their crews.

programme.title: Man Overboard
programme.desc: After months of turmoil, the fleet is starting to crack.

programme.title: The Final Battle
programme.desc: An accident brings one crabber's career to a gruesome end.

programme.title: MeatEater - Gobbling: California Turkeys
programme.desc: The last time Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen went out with Steven Rinella they were soaked head to toe and came home meatless. To remedy their meat crisis while keeping them dry, Steve sets up a springtime wild turkey hunt in sunny California. Steve gives Joe and Bryan the A to Z on hunting, butchering, and cooking the wild turkey. Steve caps off the introductory lesson by preparing his favorite turkey recipe: Schnitzel.

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 1
programme.desc: In the first part of this series, Steve attempts a unique spring hunt for sooty grouse in the coastal rainforests of southeast Alaska. These mysterious hooters make for a hunt that is markedly different from any other and success doesn't come easily. They say blind squirrels can find a nut, but will Steve harvest a grouse?

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 2
programme.desc: In Part One, Steve experienced the difficulty of hunting the Sooty grouse of southeast Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - Wild to Table: Memorable Meals Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steve loves to fish as much as he loves to hunt.Steve is on a river in SW Montana for a day to catch.

programme.title: MeatEater - Up at the Cabin: Prince of Wales Island Black Bear
programme.desc: Last spring, Steve decided to pass up an opportunity to kill a black bear in favor of an extended up close and personal experience. This time, Steve heads back to his shack on Prince of Wales Island and he's brought his friend Paul Neess from Vortex Optics along to share the experience of using a canoe to slip in close to these giant black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater - Southern Traditions: Virginia Doves
programme.desc: All across America hunters kick off the fall hunting season with a weekend of doves, friends, and food. Steve's lifelong friend, Ronny Boehme has invited Steve out to his digs in Virginia for the dove opener. To prep for opening day, Steve and Ron spend a day brushing up on their shooting skills on a sporting clays course followed by a pigeon hunt. Steve shares simple, delicious cooking methods for doves and pigeons.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mountain Meditation: BC Grizzly Bear
programme.desc: Ryan Callaghan and Aaron Evans join Steve on an epic adventure in British Columbia's Rockies to pursue grizzly bears. Steve has long desired to take a grizzly but only if he can do it in a way that fits his personal ethics. The hunt is dampened by frustrating weather but Steve finds a way to fix a tasty meal.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lobster of the Prairie: Wyoming Antelope
programme.desc: Steve is fed up with disrespect for one of the world's most unique game animals-the pronghorn antelope.

programme.title: MeatEater - Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho.

programme.title: MeatEater - Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho. To help Steve in his journey, Ryan Callaghan has offered up one of his best spots as well as his keen spotting skills. The duo backpack hunt in some of the West's steepest and prettiest mountains seeking the colossal buck of Steve's dreams. In part two Steve finds the buck he's been searching for his whole life. The dream is realized and Steve and Ryan feast on a slow cooked roast.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Butchering a Whole Deer
programme.desc: In this Cooking Special, Steve demonstrates how to butcher a whole whitetail deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 1
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode. This time around they're hunting whitetail deer in Wisconsin on the famed Duren farm with Doug Duren and Steve as their guides. Arriving a few days early to scout and tune up their shooting with some squirrel hunting, the ladies enter the next chapter of their hunting journey.

programme.title: MeatEater - Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 2
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode.

programme.title: MeatEater - Steve Makes the Team: Kentucky Small Game
programme.desc: Kevin Murphy and his band of Kentucky small game hunters introduce Steve to the finest Kentucky has to offer. Gray squirrels with tree hounds and cottontails with beagles, in Kentucky, it's the dogs that do the hunting. Cathead biscuits, sawmill gravy, and fried small game round out the Kentucky adventure.

programme.title: MeatEater - A Trip of Firsts: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steve and Janis head into the remote mountains of Sonora, Mexico, to pursue the elusive Coues deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Trapped in History: Wyoming Beaver
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to the historic beaver trapping grounds of Wyoming to explore the legacy of the mountain man era. As he sets traps along the Green River, Steve immerses himself in the methods and stories of early American trappers. Alongside his quest to catch beavers, he delves into the fascinating history of how beavers shaped the fur trade and American frontier life. It's a journey through both the rugged landscapes and the rich heritage of the American West.

programme.title: MeatEater - Conservation History, New Mexico Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and ecologist Karl Malcolm head to the Cibola National Forest, guided by a century-old tip from conservationist Aldo Leopold, to hunt Merriam's wild turkeys. Their adventure showcases the forest's rich history and the legacy of Leopold's conservation efforts while they track these elusive birds through challenging terrain.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Smoked Meats With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Steven Rinella learns new culinary tricks from Chef Eduardo Garcia, a wild game enthusiast from Charged Film & Montana Mex. As Eduardo shares his expertise in smoking meats and preparing wild game dishes, Steve takes notes, eager to expand his culinary repertoire and bring fresh flavors to his own wild game cooking adventures.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lone Star Pork: Texas Hog
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins ranch manager and wildlife biologist Ben Binnion in Texas to explore the often-overlooked aspects of hog management. During the annual pig roundup, Steve learns about the ecological impact and challenges of controlling the hog population, providing a deeper understanding of the complexities of hunting and wildlife management in the Lone Star State.

programme.title: My Friend Ben
programme.desc: Finding Samantha struggling to repair a lamp, Aunt Clara uses her uncertain powers of magic to summon an electrician. Benjamin Franklin, in l8th century clothes, appears. Samantha is upset by Ben's presence and Aunt Clara's wail that she can't remember how to undo the spell. Darrin, astonished by Ben's appearance in his home, can't convince Larry Tate that Ben is not is creation for an advertising campaign for Franklin Elec-tronics. Abner Kravitz refuses to believe Gladys' report that the real Ben Franklin is at the Stephens'. Bowing to Samantha's pleas, Darrin agrees to allow her and Aunt Clara to show Ben how his inventions are being used is the city. The next morning Ben, leaving a note that he has decided to tour the city alone to avoid causing domestic discord, sets out. Darrin, Samantha and Aunt Clara start searching for him. At a firehouse, inspecting an old fire engine, Ben steps on the accelerator. The engine shoots out into the street and slams into a curb. Ben is arrested and taken to court, where the judge, sure it is all a publicity stunt, charges him with grand larceny and sets bail at a thousand dollars. Darrin puts up the bail, knowing he will lose it if Ben doesn't appear for trial is a month. Just then, Aunt Clara remembers the spell and Ben vanishes.

programme.title: Samantha For The Defense
programme.desc: Summing up "My Friend Ben" Samantha tells how Aunt Clara, trying to summon an electrician to fix a lamp, produces Ben Franklin instead.

programme.title: Angel in Love
programme.desc: Sabrina falls in love with one Doug O'Neal, at Utopia West, a resort where people go "to learn how to touch and feel."

programme.title: Unidentified Flying Angels
programme.desc: "Suspicious" is the only word for Dr. Franklyn Perine, former astronaut Jim Britten, and their "Celestial Research Foundation," in which rich contributors are promised life in outer space, flying saucers which have arrived on earth, and other wonders, in exchange for a huge amount of money. When one wealthy lady goes into the desert with Dr. Perine and is not heard from again, the Angels must cleverly sneak into a meeting to investigate. Bosley and Kris get in easily as a rich sugar daddy and his sexy playmate. Kelly entices Britten into giving her flying lessons as well as an invitation see the space show, while Sabrina claims to be a private detective checking one of the other members. When the "doctor" tells Kris that people from outer space are very free about matters of sex, and pressures hereto begin practicing immediately, the Angels waste no time an exposing the operation as a fraud. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Angels On The Air
programme.desc: When someone tries to kill radio newswoman Joy Vance, the station naturally turns to Charlie and Company for help. The Angels' strategy is for Kelly to take over Joy's duties for a while, since their voices are similar, and for Kris and Sabrina to investigate the threats Joy has recently received. In the course of her work Joy frequently makes enemies, and one of these is probably the killer. Buck Willis, the radio station's helicopter pilot, hates Joy because she is more successful than he is. Sabrina flies with him doing the "air report," and finds him to be a man capable of violence. Dwayne Hanson, whose lifestyle is modeled after Charles Manson, believes he went to jail because Joy's reporting prejudiced a jury against him. Kris visits Dwayne and his "family" in the desert, but is not treated with great warmth hen they find out she isn't really a hippie. The last suspect is Professor Croyden, whose discovery of a cold vaccine was exposed by Joy as a fake. Croyden is known to be a skier, and the man who tried to kill Kelly (posing as Joy) was wearing a ski mask. Also, the license plates on the killer's car reveal that it was stolen that morning - from a student at Croyden's college - so Sabrina, who has just applied to be his assistant, may be in more trouble than she realizes. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Angel Baby
programme.desc: Kelly's old friend, Tommy Anders, thinks his fiancée, Marie, has deserted him, and he leaves his Army post without permission. Actually she is about to have his child, but rather than force him to marry her, she has decided to sell the baby on the black market. This decision gets her involved with Hugh Tomlinson and his bodyguard, Chaffey, of the Warfield Home for Girls. Pregnant girls are tricked into giving up their babies and kept as prisoners -- and that isn't the worst of it. After Tommy comes to the Angels for help, a girl, last seen driving away with Chaffey is discovered -- dead. In order to infiltrate the horrible "home for girls," Sabrina and Bosley pretend be a wealthy, childless couple willing to pay for a baby, Kelly pretends to pregnant, and Kris pretends that she is willing to become a "baby-maker" for the home because the is desperately in need of money. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: The Great Mayoralty Campaign
programme.desc: There is the old adage that warns never to discuss politics with your spouse... but what if you are both running for the same office?! That predicament comes true when Oliver and Lisa face each other in the Hooterville mayoral election.

programme.title: Eb's Double Trouble
programme.desc: Lisa and Oliver try to sort out of the troubles of fools in love. The problems begin when Eb invites both his girlfriend and another young woman to the same dance, while Arnold the pig falls for not one, but two attractive bovines.

programme.title: Apple Picking Time
programme.desc: Oliver is having a tough time. He has no one to help him pick the apples from his orchard, and he's promised to teach Lisa how to drive. The neighbors are all injured from assisting other harvests, and Lisa has a run-in with a sheriff.

programme.title: Enterprising Eb
programme.desc: Eb feels the time is right to settle down and marry Darlene. However, he has nowhere near the money it will take to make a down payment on a house. With the help of the Douglases, who have given him two acres of land, Eb applies for a loan.

programme.title: The High Cost Of Loving
programme.desc: Eb believes he has found his destiny when an accounting course he has enrolled in turns out to be acting workshop. All the world's a stage. Ed dives into acting and turns every simple interaction at the Douglas farm into a starring role.

programme.title: The Liberation Movement
programme.desc: After Lisa attends a Women's Liberation League meeting, she gives Oliver a scolding for denying her equal rights and demands to swap chores. While Lisa does a stellar job at Oliver's work, Oliver's attempts at hers leave something to be desired.

programme.title: Charlie, Homer And Natasha
programme.desc: Oliver refuses to take Lisa to New York City to attend the wedding anniversary of an old friend. Meanwhile, Eb, always up to something, has a new invisible friend named Charlie. To get her way, Lisa introduces her own invisible friend... Natasha.

programme.title: The Engagement Ring
programme.desc: Lisa gives the financially-challenged Eb her engagement ring to present to Darlene, his longtime sweetheart, so that he can pop the question. The ring is reportedly valued at $2,000, however, when Darlene's father has it appraised, it's a shocker.

programme.title: The Free Paint Job
programme.desc: The Douglases are offered a free paint job on their house and barn so long as they allow the paint company free advertising on their barn wall. Meanwhile, Lisa tries to make spaghetti for Oliver's upcoming birthday. Will it prove im-pasta-ble?

programme.title: Son Of Drobny
programme.desc: Lisa hosts the son of WWII hero Drobny, and all of Hooterville gets excited in anticipation of a surge of tourists. Trouble is, this hero was a duck, as is his son. Oliver tried to warn everyone they were making too much fuss over feathers.

programme.title: The Wedding Deal
programme.desc: Young lovers Eb and Darlene are just weeks away from their wedding day, but they must choose the marriage venue. It's hard to decide between a church and a car wash. At least it is for Eb, who is still looking for a way to pay for it all.

programme.title: Star Witness
programme.desc: While staying with the Douglases, Arnold the Pig witnesses a bank robbery when he goes with the Douglases on an errand in Pixley. When Lisa asks him to describe the two robbers, Arnold, reliving the moment, loses his voice from fear.

programme.title: A Girl For Drobny
programme.desc: Lisa worries about Drobny the duck when the water fowl stops eating and sleeping and suffers headaches. Eb suggests the duck needs a duck girlfriend. Lisa agrees and goes about town trying to the right partner for Drobny.

programme.title: The Carpenter's Ball
programme.desc: Oliver refuses to take Lisa to the annual Carpenter's Ball because he thinks the attendees are too eccentric for his liking. But Lisa has her own motives to attend. She is trying to get a romance sparked between two local singles.

programme.title: Lisa, The Psychologist
programme.desc: When Oliver decides to attend night school and enrolls in a farming class, Lisa does the same, taking psychology. Before long, many of the residents of Hooterville are lining up for appointments with the eminent Dr. Lisa.

programme.title: Hawaiian Honeymoon
programme.desc: Aloha! The Douglases vacation in Hawaii. But the daughter of the hotel manager needs to keep secret that she double booked the honeymoon suite. The "sweet" surprise? While Lisa and Oliver settle in, they are unaware that the other room is occupied.

programme.title: The Ex-Secretary
programme.desc: Oliver's heirloom watch is broken so he tries to find his ex-secretary Carol's address to ask her the name of the jeweler who fixed it last time. Carol is now working and living in Los Angeles, and we get a glimpse into her new life.

programme.title: Morticia, The Writer
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it, he will lose her.

programme.title: Morticia, The Sculptress
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets, a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: Gomez, The Reluctant Lover
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: Feud In The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney, to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: Gomez, The Cat Burglar
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: Portrait Of Gomez
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: Morticia's Dilemma
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter, Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: Christmas With The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fill in for him.

programme.title: Uncle Fester, Tycoon
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: Morticia & Gomez Vs. Fester & Grandmama
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: Fester Goes On A Diet
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Great Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: Ophelia Finds Romance
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: Pugsley's Allowance
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: Happy Birthday, Grandma Frump
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton) comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: Morticia, The Decorator
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: Ophelia Visits Morticia
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: Soldier
programme.desc: In Harlan Ellison's first ever science fiction teleplay, Michael Ansara portrays a man born and bred to be a killing machine who finds himself without a war when a time warp sends him from a future earth to the present day. Lloyd Nolan also stars.

programme.title: Cold Hands, Warm Heart
programme.desc: Star Trek's William Shatner stars as the first man to successfully land on Venus. But when he suddenly starts craving heat -- more heat than humans can stand -- it is just the beginning of a nightmare brought back from The Outer Limits.

programme.title: Behold, Eck!
programme.desc: When a 2-dimensional being, Eck, becomes trapped in our 3-dimensional world, a certain lens made from meteoric quartz is its only hope of an escape from the confines of Earth. Peter Lind Hayes, Joan Freeman and Parley Baer star.

programme.title: Expanding Human
programme.desc: When funding is suddenly cut off for a research project where "expanded humans" are created with consciousness-raising drugs, Star Trek's James Doohan and Skip Homier find themselves prey to science run amok in this suspense-laden "whodunit."

programme.title: Demon With A Glass Hand
programme.desc: In a role written for him by Harlan Ellison, Robert Culp stars as Trent, a man from the future who escapes back into our present. Pursued by an alien race which has conquered future Earth -- the fate of all humankind lies in Trent's glass hand.

programme.title: Cry Of Silence
programme.desc: For Andy Thorne (Eddie Albert) and his wife, Karen (June Havoc), an innocent drive into the countryside turns into a living nightmare when they become trapped in a remote canyon ruled by a strange alien force with which they cannot communicate.

programme.title: The Invisible Enemy
programme.desc: When a rescue mission is sent to Mars to discover the fate of a doomed expedition, the Commander (Adam West) and his crew find themselves hunted by an invisible enemy who seems intent on picking them off...one at a time. Ted Knight co-stars.

programme.title: Wolf 359
programme.desc: When a professor (Patrick O'Neal) manages to clone a distant planet in miniature, he introduces human DNA into the ecosystem. What is spawned, however, are the darkest, most horrific aspects of Earth's troubled development. Dabney Coleman co-stars.
